brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a death grip on the market, with the Fear & Greed Index plunging to 28 as BTC's 30-day momentum crumbles, yet a weakening DXY under a RISK_ON regime is quietly building a pressure cooker. This is the same emotional and structural fingerprint as the August 2024 bottom, where panic exhausted itself just before a violent snap-back. The crowd is bracing for a breakdown, but the floor feels borrowed from a past where sellers ran out of ammo.
brain_consensus.headline: Panic Mirrors August Bottom as Dollar Fades
